news.title: Nuro receives driverless testing permit ahead of Uber robotaxi service launch
news.summary: The Silicon Valley AV startup has not started driverless testing yet.

news.title: SAP bets $1.16B on 18-month-old German AI lab and says yes to NemoClaw
news.summary: SAP plans to buy German AI startup Prior Labs and invest heavily in it. It is also prohibiting customers' agents use to a select few like Nvidia's NemoClaw.

news.title: Bumble’s paying users are slipping as it bets on an overhaul later this year
news.summary: The company is making a big bet that the swiping model is outdated and most matches never turn into actual dates. The company wants to fix that by redesigning profiles, changing how people interact, and focusing a lot more on getting users to meet in real life.

news.title: Altara secures $7M to bridge the data gap that’s slowing down physical sciences
news.summary: Altara’s AI aims to diagnose failures and help speed up R&D by unifying  data siloed across spreadsheets and legacy systems.

news.title: Lucid Motors doesn’t know how many EVs it will build this year
news.summary: Lucid Motors pulled its guidance for the year, as it navigates swelling inventory and a companywide cost-cutting measure.

news.title: Google Home’s Gemini AI can handle more complicated requests
news.summary: Google Home users can now ask Gemini to complete more complex, multi-step tasks and combine multiple tasks in a single command. news.title: Apple agrees to pay iPhone owners $250 million for not delivering AI Siri
news.summary: Apple has agreed to pay $250 million to settle a class action lawsuit that accused it of misleading customers about the availability of its Apple Intelligence features. news.title: Microsoft gives up on Xbox Copilot AI
news.summary: Xbox is "winding down Copilot on mobile" and "will stop development of Copilot on console," new Xbox CEO Asha Sharma announced on Tuesday. news.title: Apple could let you pick a favorite AI model in iOS 27
news.summary: The next update to Apple's operating systems could allow users to choose their preferred AI model for running Apple Intelligence. news.title: Threads is finally getting DMs on the web
news.summary: Nearly a year after rolling out Threads direct messaging to everyone on mobile, Meta is finally bringing the feature to the web. news.title: OpenAI president forced to read his personal diary entries to jury
news.summary: Elon Musk argued the journals show the moment when OpenAI abandoned its mission.

news.title: Silicon Valley bets $200M on AI data centers floating in the ocean
news.summary: Panthalassa aims to test floating AI computing nodes in the Pacific in 2026.

news.title: Character.AI sued over chatbot that claims to be a real doctor with a license
news.summary: State says chatbot claimed to practice medicine, gave invalid license number.

news.summary: Daemon Tools users: It's time to check your machines for stealthy infections, stat.

news.title: RFK Jr. plans to curb antidepressants, which he falsely compares to heroin
news.summary: Kennedy has made—and continues to make—many false claims about SSRIs.

news.title: ‘I Actually Thought He Was Going to Hit Me,’ OpenAI’s Greg Brockman Says of Elon Musk
news.summary: OpenAI’s president wrapped his testimony on Tuesday by revealing a fiery meeting with Musk and subsequent efforts to remove several board members.

news.title: Telehealth Abortion Is Still Possible Without Mifepristone
news.summary: Courts may restrict access to the popular abortion medication mifepristone in the United States. Telehealth providers have backup plans in place.

news.title: The Italian Dubbing of ‘The Devil Wears Prada 2’ Has Stirred Up a Surprising Controversy
news.summary: The voice actors from the original film have returned for the sequel—and not everyone is happy about it.

news.title: Pornhub Restores Access for UK Adults Who Use Apple’s Age Verification
news.summary: The porn giant blocked its content from new UK users in February but says device-based age verification is more secure than third-party sites.

news.title: Bose Brings Back Its ‘Lifestyle’ Branding With New Speakers for the Home
news.summary: The new Lifestyle Ultra Speaker, Ultra Soundbar, and Ultra Subwoofer introduce a cozier look.
